channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: INJ eyes a bounce: code-ready setup near $2.90, signals hint at a run to $3.26 if it clears $2.98 soon. 🧪 Breakout risk hugs $2.80 support. https://Blockchain.News/news/20260328-price-prediction-inj-targets-326-breakout-by-mid-april #INJ #Crypto #PricePrediction
